headline: United's latest Economy Plus gambit? Kick out the middle-seat passenger for more space.
summary: United Airlines has found a new way to monetize the seat nobody wants to sit in — by kicking the passenger out and charging more for the space.

headline: What Kept Coming Up When Analysts Grilled DAL
summary: Delta's record results look great on paper, but analysts on its latest call kept testing one big question about whether the good times can actually last.

headline: Is United (UAL) Turning Extra-Space Economy Seats Into a Durable Premium-Brand Advantage?
summary: United Airlines announced in the past that its new Airbus A321XLRs will feature an Economy Plus row with extra elbow room, a shared table across an open middle seat, larger 4K screens, and expanded premium seating including new Polaris Studio suites. This move positions United as the only U.S. carrier offering this specific Economy Plus configuration, highlighting its focus on product differentiation in long-haul narrowbody flying and potential appeal to comfort-seeking economy...

headline: Frontier Airlines to add Starlink internet on planes starting 2027
summary: Investing.com -- Frontier Airlines Inc. announced Tuesday it will install SpaceX's Starlink on its aircraft by early 2027, joining a growing number of carriers choosing Elon Musk's company for inflight Wi-Fi service.

headline: Wall Street Analysts Believe United (UAL) Could Rally 26.63%: Here's is How to Trade
summary: The mean of analysts' price targets for United (UAL) points to a 26.6% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.

headline: United Launches Another Economy Class Innovation: Economy Plus Seats With Extra Elbow Room
summary: United today announced its latest United Economy® class innovation: a row of Economy Plus seats on its new Airbus A321XLR aircraft with extra elbow room and access to a shared table across an open middle seat.
